TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Harrison_Barnes, title = Harrison_Barnes, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Harrison_Barnes} }

S.FORM: Harrison Barnes hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing / pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1992, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 5, Harrison Barnes, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Harrison Barnes hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing / pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1992, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 5, Harrison Barnes, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
